Block.Para: An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Toronto ГўВЂВ” Danforth

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
This enactment changes the name of the electoral district of Toronto ГўВЂВ” Danforth to ГўВЂВњToronto ГўВЂВ” Danforth ГўВЂВ” East York ГўВЂВ” RiverdaleГўВЂВќ.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Electoral district of Toronto ГўВЂВ” Danforth

Block.Para: An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Toronto ГўВЂВ” Danforth
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Block.MarginalNote: Name changed to ГўВЂВњToronto ГўВЂВ” Danforth ГўВЂВ” East York ГўВЂВ” RiverdaleГўВЂВќ
Block.Para: 1. In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of August 25, 2003 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 94 of that part relating to the Province of Ontario is amended by substituting the name ГўВЂВњToronto ГўВЂВ” Danforth ГўВЂВ” East York ГўВЂВ” RiverdaleГўВЂВќ for the name ГўВЂВњToronto ГўВЂВ” DanforthГўВЂВќ.

Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
